Thank you for contributing to koel/franken — the Standalone Binary distribution of Koel.

This repository only covers the standalone-binary packaging: the launcher script, build script, release workflow, and release archives. For changes to Koel itself (the application, the web UI, the API), please open your PR against https://github.com/koel/koel instead.
-->

## Checklist
- [ ] This PR only touches the standalone-binary packaging (launcher, build script, workflows, docs); changes to Koel itself belong in [koel/koel](https://github.com/koel/koel).
- [ ] I've tested my changes locally (e.g. by running `./build.sh` and exercising the produced archive).
- [ ] The smoke-test workflow passes against my branch.
